mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS applicationId, a.status AS status, a.final_status AS finalStatus, a.message AS message, a.apply_time AS applyTime, a.interview_time AS interviewTime, a.interview_note AS interviewNote, r.id AS recruitmentId, r.title AS title, r.position AS position, r.salary_range AS salaryRange, r.location AS location, r.enterprise_id AS hrUserId, e.company_name AS companyName FROM bus_job_application a LEFT JOIN bus_recruitment r ON r.id = a.recruitment_id LEFT JOIN info_enterprise e ON e.user_id = r.enterprise_id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.id AS applicationId, a.status AS status, a.final_status AS finalStatus, a.message AS message, a.apply_time AS applyTime, a.interview_time AS interviewTime, a.interview_note AS interviewNote, u.user_id AS studentUserId, u.real_name AS realName, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.college AS college, s.major AS major, s.resume_file AS resumeFile FROM bus_job_application a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = a.student_id LEFT JOIN info_student s ON s.user_id = a.student_id WHERE a.recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
